Copra Classics · Lunch
Fish & Chips
Beer-battered fresh fillet of the day served with crispy potato chips, tartar sauce and a side salad
FJD$34
Price
1×
Portions
15 min
Prep
10 min
Cook
Lunch
Service
Ingredients
IngredientUnitQty
Protein
Fresh fish fillet of the dayg180
Batter
Plain flourg80
Lager beerml100
Baking powderg3.0
Sides
Potato chips, par-cookedg160
Sauce
Tartar sauceg40
Garnish
Lemon wedgeeach1
Method
1
Whisk flour, baking powder and salt. Add cold beer. Whisk to smooth batter. Rest 10 min.
2
Heat fryer oil to 180°C.
3
Pat fish fillet dry. Season. Coat in batter, allowing excess to drip.
4
Fry 4–5 min until golden and crisp. Internal temp 65°C. Drain on paper.
5
Fry chips at 190°C for 3 min until golden. Plate fish over chips.
Plating Notes
Fish angled over chips. Lemon wedge on lip. Tartar in ramekin. Side salad separate.
Equipment
Deep fryer x2 · Probe thermometer · Paper drain tray
Allergens
GLUTEN EGGS FISH DAIRY
TREE NUTS PEANUTS SHELLFISH SOY SESAME CELERY MUSTARD LUPIN MOLLUSCS SULPHITES
